title: Satya Vanilla Incense Sticks – Box 12 packs
features: Satya Sai Baba Nag Champa Incense from Shrinivas Sugandhalaya factory.
The Nag Champa collection is the most famous incense brand in the world. It is traditionally made from a sandalwood base to which a variety of flower oils is added.
Each 15g pack contains approximately 12-15 incense sticks.
Each incense stick is individually hand rolled in high quality oils, so each stick may vary slightly in thickness.
SATYA VANILLA INCENSE 15 GR X 12 BOXES = 180 GR.
description: Satya Pack of 12 Vanilla Incense Sticks Height 13cm Width 22cm Depth 8cm Each 15g pack contains approximately 12-15 incense sticks (depending on weight). Each incense stick is individually hand rolled in high quality oils, so each stick may vary slightly in thickness. Satya Sai Baba Nag Champa Incense from Shrinivas Sugandhalaya factory. The Nag Champa collection is the most famous incense brand in the world. It is traditionally made from a sandalwood base to which a variety of flower oils is added. The brand is used everywhere in Buddhist temples as a wonderful aid for personal meditation in ritual or to do spell work, or simply to create a wonderful and pleasant atmosphere in the home. Available in boxes of 12 packs.
